calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-13-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-06-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Tito Torres, Esq. appeared for plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
No appearance by defendant Derrick Tyler.
Default was entered against defendant on March 5, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed today, May 6, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority, and against the Defaulted Defendant Derrick Tyler as follows:

Defendant Derrick Tyler is enjoined and restrained from being within 150 yards or any and all San Francisco Housing Authority property, perpetually pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure Section 526.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2010 Continued To May-17-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
